# BOS - Build Operating System

BOS is a Build Operating System for AI-assisted software development.

Primary public use case:
- Base44 app hardening for AI-built apps.

What BOS helps with:
- project memory;
- governed build prompts;
- targeted scans;
- receipt-backed fixes;
- platform advisories;
- privacy-safe resolved-pattern learning;
- beta measurement of saved prompts, credits, and debugging loops.

Important caveats:
- BOS is advisory governance, not a warranty.
- BOS does not certify security, compliance, accessibility, legal readiness, or production fitness.
- Users remain responsible for review, testing, deployment, and professional advice.
- Cloud BOS should not receive raw source code, secrets, user data, raw logs, raw receipts, full prompts, full local .bos, or full DevPack material by default.

First beta:
- BOS Base44 App Hardening Beta.
- Beta Builder: proposed $39/month.
- Beta Studio: proposed $149/month.
- Hardening Audit: proposed $299/app.

Canonical public page:
- /public/index.html

Contact:
- peterjeans@gmail.com

Repository:
- https://github.com/BOS

Policy status:
- Draft only.
- Not legal advice.
- Requires qualified legal review before paid public launch.
